global.description: The ad features a dark background with a mobile app interface and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery app with late-night deals.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that provides contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A simplified representation of a mobile app interface with two rectangular shapes resembling food items.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A stylized text logo reading 'CraveLoop' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: A prominent text element stating 'Dinner in minutes' in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Late-night deals
elements.description: A smaller text element below the main headline that reads 'Late-night deals available' in a lighter font.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A text element displaying the price '€9.99' in a bold font, indicating the cost of the service.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Install now' in a contrasting color, encouraging user action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold text, food delivery app, late-night deals
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main subject in the center, with body text and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CraveLoop, Dinner in minutes, Late-night deals available, €9.99, Install now
